overall.description: First-person game footage depicting a nighttime walk through rural countryside approaching a traditional wooden village. The player uses a warm flashlight to illuminate a dirt path through grassy fields before entering a narrow passage between wooden cabins.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through open fields illuminated by flashlight

entered.detail: unpaved dirt trail illuminated by warm flashlight
tall grass fields flanking both sides of the path
tall grass fields flanking both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: Walking through open countryside at night, the flashlight illuminates a dirt path surrounded by tall grass fields. The environment is quiet and empty with no structures visible in the darkness.

events.description: large oak tree appears on the left side of the path
wooden village buildings become visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the environment transitions from open fields to a tree-lined approach with distant buildings

entered.detail: large tree with dense foliage on the left side of the path
dark silhouettes of wooden village buildings visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: A large oak tree emerges on the left side of the path as the open fields give way to a more defined trail. In the distance, the dark silhouettes of wooden village buildings become visible against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow village alley between wooden cabins

events.description: entering the village between wooden buildings
passing closely between two wooden cabins that flank the path

agents.ego_description: walking into the village through a narrow passage between traditional wooden cabins

entered.detail: traditional wooden cabin with weathered planks and shingled roof
traditional wooden cabin with thatched or shingled roof
simple wooden fence posts along the left side

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow village alley, passing between traditional wooden cabins with weathered walls. The path becomes enclosed as the flashlight illuminates the wooden structures on either side, creating an intimate, sheltered atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the isolation of an open nighttime countryside into the enclosed intimacy of a traditional wooden village. It begins with a flashlight cutting through the darkness to illuminate a dirt path surrounded by vast, empty fields of tall grass. As the camera advances, the open landscape narrows around a large oak tree on the left, while the dark silhouettes of village buildings gradually emerge on the horizon. The scene then shifts as the path leads directly into a narrow village alley, where the open sky is replaced by the weathered walls of traditional wooden cabins. Finally, the movement concludes within this sheltered passage, with the flashlight beam reflecting off the close-set structures on either side.
